personal.title: Passionate software and video game developer with particular expertise in the following areas:
personal.subtitle: Web, software and game developer. From concept to production, I turn ideas into captivating interactive experiences that leave a mark on users.
personal.bio: Versatile developer specialized in gameplay mechanics, visual design, and game production. Self-taught, I started by creating additional content for games, which gave me a deep understanding of development processes. With a BUT degree in Application Integration and Information Systems Management from IUT Montpellier-Sète and a Bachelor in Game Development, I honed my skills in project management and technical development during a two-year apprenticeship at Studio La Moutarde. My goal: to keep growing technically and contribute to ambitious projects in game development and software engineering.

contact.status: BUT 3 Student - Apprentice at Studio La Moutarde

about.intro: From concept to deployment, I build polished applications and experiences, caring as much about architecture as about how it feels to use.

highlights.text: 2.5 years of professional experience in C# / .NET
Contributor to Terra Memoria, a commercial game shipped on PC & consoles
Self-taught modding: 1M+ cumulative downloads on Steam (Call of Duty: Black Ops III)
